name: Dog Kids' Long Weighted Plush Throw Pillow Tan - Pillowfort™
description: Infuse your little one's room with pawsome flair with this Dog Long Weighted Plush Throw Pillow from Pillowfort™. This decorative tan pillow is designed in the shape of a dog wearing a striped sweater and collar with 'Brulee' charm for a cute look. Boasting a polyester-spandex knit exterior and polyester filling for plush comfort, the long dog weighted pillow is perfect for snuggling, decorating or gifting.
